title: Priorities for the CAA within the uncrewed aerial system (UAS) sector
body: "Letter from the Minister for Aviation, Maritime and Security and Minister of State for Science, Research and Innovation to the Chief Executive of the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA). The letter sets out expectations for how the CAA will prioritise growth in the uncrewed aerial system (UAS) sector.  These expectations are within the work programme that the Department for Transport has agreed to grant to the CAA for 2025 to 2026.  "
